description: Image-pattern fills driven end-to-end through a fill legend. Three small self-contained (data URI) tile images are used as pattern fills for an ordinal scale, with repeat mode and tile size exposed as bound signals -- image patterns have no foreground color knob (unlike named/shape/rule patterns), so color variation here comes entirely from the source images.

range.signal: [{pattern: {url: 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAwAAAAMCAYAAABWdVznAAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAALUlEQVQokWO8/fzjfwYsoHDidmzCDExYRfGA4aCB0adiBdZQ6s/3pI4Nw0EDAG8uCTRp1W/iAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC', tileSize: tileSizeValue, repeat: repeatValue}}, {pattern: {url: 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAwAAAAMCAYAAABWdVznAAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAAX0lEQVQokZXQUQrAIAwD0LQG9BY77w7s9/YzRtSC9UMIIcij1u/rMVbge8YKFMkcs5+MwQYuZYnG7c8+/ByOI9KGoT0zDO09w1D2eqWAoWxmGMr2DEPZnmFMV9oztH8BTvIJCvT4lwIAAAAASUVORK5CYII=', tileSize: tileSizeValue, repeat: repeatValue}}, {pattern: {url: 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAwAAAAMCAYAAABWdVznAAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAAWklEQVQokWN8+fXVfwYSABMpiumjgQVd4PzTMwyrLixhYGBgYAgziGEwlDbBb8PqC0sZPv34yPDpx0eG1ReWUu4kDA3hBrEM/BwCDPwcAgzhBrEYGhiHQTwAAH/0GbNY0L1SAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC', tileSize: tileSizeValue, repeat: repeatValue}}]
